testCases.title: ESPM import completes for a valid account
testCases.description: Ensure ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager sync succeeds.
testCases.expectedResult: Import finishes with a success toast and imported buildings appear.

testCases.title: Successfully save a proposal containing v3 measures
testCases.description:
Source: https://simuwatt.atlassian.net/browse/BUIL-14606
This test verifies that a proposal containing v3 measures can be saved without encountering any errors.
steps: Open an existing proposal or create a new one
Add at least one v3 measure to the proposal
Make a minor change to the proposal
testCases.expectedResult: The proposal should save successfully, and no error messages should be displayed.
